SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERIAN, EUGENIO DBA EC & PS AKA EUGENIO CLEANING & PAINTING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEZYNSKI, CHRISTOPHER MICHAELS, DAN PREMIER BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC PREMIER BUILING MAINTENANCE SERVICES, INC $1,837.50 PRINCIPAL, $183.75 INTEREST, $319.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,340.25, DAMAGES ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1837.50 FOR THE DEFENDANTS FAILURE TO PAY PLAINTIFF: $937.50 FOR WORK FOR SUPPER CLUB AND $900.00 FOR WORK AT CCDC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
